farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.lore: A diligent villager who teaches you how to turn duplicates into emeralds.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.lore: A mysterious cleric who can transform duplicate mobs into magical roll tokens.
cleric.description: Convert duplicate mobs into roll tokens

toolsmith.name: Toolsmith
toolsmith.lore: A skilled toolsmith who allows you one free reroll per day to correct your luck.

librarian.name: Librarian
librarian.lore: A wise librarian who teaches you how to perform a focused roll once per day, avoiding common mobs.
librarian.description: Focused roll once per day (no Commons)
